hero.headline: Tuzobereye mu gutanga serivisi zo kuranga no kugurisha Amazu n'ibibanza, ubwubatsi no gukodesha imodoka i Kigali, Rwanda
hero.subheadline: Construction Supply and Commission Agent Ltd itanga serivisi zizewe mu kuranga Amazu n'ibibanza, ubwubatsi, no gukodesha imodoka — ifasha abantu bwite n'ibigo by'ubucuruzi guteza imbere imirimo yabo.

about.title: Ibyerekeye CSCA
about.content: Construction Supply and Commission Agent Ltd ni sosiyete ikorera i Kigali itanga serivisi za kinyamwuga mu kuranga no kugurisha amazu n'ibibanza, ubwubatsi no gukodesha imodoka. Dukorana n'abantu bwite, ibigo binini n'ibito mu gutanga serivisi zizewe, zikorwa neza kandi zihuye n'isoko ry'akarere.
about.content2: Uburyo bwacu bushingiye ku cyizere, gukora neza no kubahiriza amasezerano. Dukorana n'abakiriya mu bikorwa byo kuranga/kugurisha amazu n'ibibanza, ubwubatsi cyangwa gukodesha imodoka, dukora ibikwiye kugira ngo haboneke agaciro n'ubufatanye bw'igihe kirekire.

realEstate.title: Kuranga no Kugurisha Amazu n'ibibanza
realEstate.description: Gufata no gucunga imitungo mu buryo bwiza buhuye n'isoko ry'u Rwanda.
items: Ihererekanya ry'ibibanza n'amazu rinyuze mu mucyo
Gusura aho imitungo iri no guhuza amakuru ajyanye nayo

construction.title: Ibikoresho by'Ubwubatsi
construction.description: Gushakisha ibikoresho by'ubwubatsi biringaniye bishimwe n'abatuza b'inzobere ku isi hose.

vehicle.title: Gukodesha Imodoka
vehicle.description: Gukodesha imodoka igihe gito n'amasezerano y'igihe kirekire no gucunga imikorere y'imodoka z'amasosiyete.

rental.title: Serivisi zo Gukodesha Imodoka
items: Gukodesha imodoka mu gihe kigufi n'igihe kirekire
Gukodesha imodoka ku bikorwa by'ubucuruzi n'ibikorwa bwite

leasing.title: Serivisi zo gukodesha Imodoka
items: Amasezerano y'igihe kirekire ku bantu bwite n'amasosiyete
Gukodesha imodoka mu gihe gigufi n'igihe kirekire

why.title: Impamvu yo Kuduhitamo
items: Ubunararibonye ku isoko rya Kigali n'u Rwanda muri rusange
Gutanga serivisi mu mucyo kandi kinyamwuga
Ubushobozi bwo gutanga serivisi nyinshi nk'kigo kimwe

steps.title: Ubujyanama
steps.description: Dutangira tugirana ikiganiro cyimbitse kugira ngo dusobanukirwe intego zawe n'ibyo ukeneye ngo zigerweho.

steps.title: Gusesengura ibikenewe
steps.description: Itsinda ryacu rireba ibyo ukeneye kandi rigashaka uburyo bwiza bwo gushyira mu bikorwa umushinga wawe.

steps.title: Gutegura no Gushaka igisubizo
steps.description: Dutegura mu buryo bunoze kandi tugashaka igisubizo gihuye n'ibyo ukeneye.

steps.title: Gushyira mu Bikorwa
steps.description: Inzobere zacu zishyira mu bikorwa gahunda yateganyijwe mu buryo bwiza no mu gihe cyateganyijwe

steps.title: Gukurikirana no Gutanga ubufasha
steps.description: Dukurikirana kandi tugatanga ubufasha kugira ngo tumenye ko abakiriya bacu bayuzwe na serivisi twabahaye

contact.title: Twandikire
contact.subtitle: Tuganire
contact.company: Construction Supply and Commission Agent Ltd

form.name: Izina Ryuzuye
form.success: Ubutumwa bwawe bwoherejwe neza. Tuzagusubiza vuba.

footer.tagline: Serivisi zo kuranga no kugurisha amazu n'ibibanza, ubwubatsi no gukodesha imodoka i Kigali, Rwanda.

cookie.message: Dukoresha cookies kugira ngo itangwa rya serivisi ryawe rinoze no gusesengura ubukirwa bw'urubuga. Mu gukomeza gukoresha, wemera amategeko yacu ya cookies.
